question_text: In a right pyramid VABCD with square base ABCD of side 10cm and apex V at height 12cm above the center, M is the midpoint of edge VA. Find the perpendicular distance from M to the base plane.
raw_output:
{
  "dimension": "3d",
  "axes": false,
  "scale": {
    "reference": "AB",
    "real": "10 cm",
    "units": 5.0

    "A": [2.5, -2.5, 0.0],
    "B": [2.5, 2.5, 0.0],
    "C": [-2.5, 2.5, 0.0],
    "D": [-2.5, -2.5, 0.0],
    "V": [0.0, 0.0, 6.0],
    "O": [0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
    "M": [1.25, -1.25, 3.0],
    "M_proj": [1.25, -1.25, 0.0]
  },
  "lines": [
    {"id": "line_AB", "from": "A", "to": "B"},
    {"id": "line_BC", "from": "B", "to": "C"},
    {"id": "line_CD", "from": "C", "to": "D", "style": "dashed"},
    {"id": "line_DA", "from": "D", "to": "A", "style": "dashed"},
    {"id": "line_VA", "from": "V", "to": "A"},
    {"id": "line_VB", "from": "V", "to": "B"},
    {"id": "line_VC", "from": "V", "to": "C"},
    {"id": "line_VD", "from": "V", "to": "D", "style": "dashed"},
    {"id": "line_VO", "from": "V", "to": "O", "style": "dashed"},
    {"id": "line_MM_proj", "from": "M", "to": "M_proj", "style": "dashed"}
  ],
  "circles": [],
  "faces": [
    {"id": "face_ABCD", "points": ["A", "B", "C", "D"]},
    {"id": "face_VAB", "points": ["V", "A", "B"]},
    {"id": "face_VBC", "points": ["V", "B", "C"]},
    {"id": "face_VCD", "points": ["V", "C", "D"]},
    {"id": "face_VDA", "points": ["V", "D", "A"]}
  ],
  "angles": [
    {"id": "angle_VOA", "vertex": "O", "p1": "V", "p2": "A", "value": 90.0},
    {"id": "angle_MM_proj_A", "vertex": "M_proj", "p1": "M", "p2": "A", "value": 90.0}
